evidence.command: bash -c a=$(wc -l < skills/ditto-skill-creator/SKILL.md); b=$(wc -l < skills/ditto-agent-creator/SKILL.md); [ "$a" -lt 67 ] && [ "$b" -lt 57 ] && ! grep -qF "the parts that matter" skills/ditto-skill-creator/SKILL.md && ! grep -qF "Anti-patterns to avoid" skills/ditto-skill-creator/SKILL.md && ! grep -qF "Anti-patterns to avoid" skills/ditto-agent-creator/SKILL.md && grep -qF writing-great-artifacts skills/ditto-skill-creator/SKILL.md && grep -qF writing-great-artifacts skills/ditto-agent-creator/SKILL.md && echo "AC1_PASS ($a/$b lines)"
